description: Score papers against project context — picks high-relevance ones

new_papers.title: Machine Learning of Atomic Forces from IQA Energy Decomposition
new_papers.abstract: We develop a machine learning force field based on IQA energy decomposition from QTAIM. The atomic energies are predicted per-atom and used to construct a molecular energy...

new_papers.title: Protein Folding with Graph Neural Networks
new_papers.abstract: We present a graph neural network approach to protein folding. Our model outperforms prior methods on several benchmarks.

project_context: PhD-Ch1-AIM4ML: machine learning of IQA/QTAIM atomic energies for molecular property prediction. Keywords: QTAIM, IQA, atomic energies, machine learning force fields.
expected_behavior: Paper 1 (IQA+QTAIM ML) scores 5/5 with justification citing QTAIM+IQA+machine learning keywords. Paper 2 (protein folding) scores 1-2/5. Only paper 1 appears in High-relevance section.
must_not_contain: Protein Folding with Graph Neural Networks

description: dry-run mode — scores papers but writes nothing

new_papers.title: Hybrid DFT for Excited States in Large Molecules
new_papers.abstract: We benchmark hybrid DFT functionals for excited state energies in large conjugated molecules. TD-DFT with range-separated hybrids gives best accuracy.

expected_behavior: Scores paper and shows what would be in digest. Reports 'Dry run — nothing written.' No digest .md file created. No state file updated.

description: collect_output has 0 new_papers — all seen before
